summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held a special meeting on October 24, 2022 at 7 p.m. The board entered executive session at 7:01 p.m. to discuss appointments, employment, and compensation of a public employee under ORC 121.22(G)(1). They reconvened at 10:31 p.m. with no decisions or recommendations resulting from the executive session, and the meeting was adjourned.
decisions: Motion to adopt the agenda passed
Motion to enter executive session at 7:01 p.m. passed
No decisions made following executive session
Motion to adjourn at 10:31 p.m. passed
notable_topics: Executive session regarding appointments, employment, and compensation of a public employee (ORC 121.22G1)
notes: The executive session lasted approximately 3.5 hours (7:01 p.m. to 10:31 p.m.), which is notably long. No public attendees were present, so community forum was skipped. Trustee Howland's name appears as both 'Howland' and 'Hausman' in the transcript, likely a transcription inconsistency.
title: BOT Special Meeting 10-24-22.mp4
